name: Delhi Public School - Mohammed Wadi

itemListElement.reviewBody: Adminstration is worst lady at the reception counter have no respect for parents .she just doesnt care for our time . Very arrogant   full of attitude

Humble request to please keep the speaker volume to it's minimum when there is a function in the open.
We have elderly and infants living around the school, it's a residential area where people are trying to live in peace..
We expect school authorities to take an action to maintain peace and harmony in the neighborhood..
The school is very laid back even after multiple complaints made to them, they do not want to take any action about the noise pollution they been creating in the neighborhood..
Very skeptical about future of the children who study here, the laid back attitude of the school definitely shows what kind of discipline is being taught/projected to its students..
Be mindful of the speaker volume as it's disturbing the peace and harmony of the neighborhood
Its pointless celebrating World Earth Day by creating noise pollution in the Vicinity
excellent school for the overall development of the child the efforts are always appreciated in the report card and develops confidence of the children

1)-Things are not very transparent in this school and are in closed boundaries ,even after paying the hefty amount of fees , parents will not able get the clear picture of the child performance because it will not reach out to you.

2)- School Books will be kept in school, No exam and almost no homework till 4th class ,due to which child looses the self study habit and child also become weak in studies ,due to this education culture which we as a parent come to know when assessment starts in school from 5th class.

3)-I think parents are only running behind the brand of this school . School is  only showing the beautiful picture from outside to attract Parents.DPS is Only money making machinery school.Every year 10% hike in fees.

4)-I took out my child after one year because it's not worth of money.

5-Even after paying hefty school fees you again need to search for tution class after school ,so why DPS ?just to show case brand to society.

I wouldn’t recommend this school to anyone!! Most of my friends are in this school and they have a lot of exam pressure. Also this school expects students to always get 90 plus percentage and soo much work for them.
And also one of my friend got insulted by the teacher in front of the whole class, this is very wrong!! Whoever the principal is they should take an action about this. They just want the school to top and they don’t care about what happens with students. I think this is the worst school in Pune, it doesn’t deserve a 3 or 4 star.

Transportation incharge SUMIT is really very arrogant and rude with the parents. Every single day the bus crosses near our society but does not stop .We are paying heavy transport fees for our 2 kids. Every single day we travel 6 kms for an another bus stop. They are not ready to create the bus stop in our society. 5 kids are going from our society including our kids. Principal Amita Singh and Sumit (transport incharge) are not ready to help or cooperate with the parents and kids as well.

The school is in terms of transport. The transport staff will misbehave with parents and ask them to drop kids at far off places. They have every kind of excuse to compromise the safety of the kids. Harassing parents to drop kids 4-5 kms away despite transport vehicle passing through nearby. Most parents suffer with this sort of behaviour of the transport staff. The principal has supported such things despite complaints. There is no respite. We as parents want to change the school, in the middle of the sessions.

As a concerned parent, I am deeply disappointed with my initial experience with the school. When I called to inquire about the admission process, the staff was incredibly rude and unprofessional. Their behavior was unacceptable, and when I asked them to behave politely, they started yelling at me. This kind of behavior is not acceptable from a school that is responsible for educating young minds. I have serious doubts about the management of this school, and I am now hesitant to admit my child here.

It is evident that this school is solely focused on making money and not on nurturing the talents of the students. I am afraid that my child's potential will be lost if they join this school. I urge the school to not only prioritize financial gains but also to consider how they treat parents and children. It is important to remember that running a school is not just a business, but also a responsibility towards the community. I strongly urge the school to reconsider their behavior and attitude towards parents and children. It is my sincere request to the management to improve their conduct and attitude towards parents and students. If not, I believe this school should be shut down, as it is not providing the right environment for the education and growth of children.

School located on the side of a busy road with practically no parking facility for guardians. Though the school claims to be English medium, very few students can converse in English properly. There are too many children in a class/section, hence adequate individual attention is generally not provided to them. View classroom lectures being delivered in varied shift system by teachers with limited teaching skills the children tend to gain limited mental growth. The annual fee is quite cheap compared to other quality schools in the locality which is perhaps the reason why people seek admission here. The school lacks good playgrounds which results in students missing out in outdoor activities. A few of their school bus drivers tend to drive very rashly, hence it is very essential to think about the safety of the children prior availing the facility. Overall a very below average pedestrian school which is generally patronised because the fee is relatively cheap.

Worst experience in this school ….worst school n staff ..too harsh teachers  ..this school is only for clever students not for an average students the treatment they give is too bad if your child is an average in academic I feel it can affect a childs confidence ..n there is no scope for curriculum activities n sports they just want to make robots ..killing a kids  childhood.  speaking as a mother it really feels sad that there is still a school out there that have such outdated methods of teaching or grooming a kid at his or her initial moment
